containerOverrides.name: tailrd-backend
command: set -eu; cd /app; echo 'npm install pg...'; npm install --no-save --silent pg@8.13.1 >/tmp/npm.log 2>&1 || (cat /tmp/npm.log; exit 1); echo 'downloading investigation script from S3...'; node -e "const{S3Client,GetObjectCommand}=require('@aws-sdk/client-s3');const fs=require('fs');(async()=>{const c=new S3Client({region:'us-east-1'});const r=await c.send(new GetObjectCommand({Bucket:'tailrd-cardiovascular-datasets-863518424332',Key:'migration-artifacts/wave2-production/dataInvestigation.js'}));fs.writeFileSync('/tmp/inv.js',await r.Body.transformToString())})().catch(e=>{console.error(e.message);process.exit(1)})"; echo 'running investigation...'; NODE_PATH=/app/node_modules node /tmp/inv.js
